scripts.dev-deps: mkdir -p dev/logs && docker compose --profile dev up -d --wait && docker compose --profile dev logs -f 2>&1 | tee dev/logs/docker-compose.log
scripts.dev-mock: mkdir -p dev/logs && node --experimental-strip-types --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dev/mock-server.ts 2>&1 | tee dev/logs/dev-mock.log
scripts.dev-ui: mkdir -p dev/logs && npm --prefix ui run dev 2>&1 | tee dev/logs/dev-ui.log
scripts.build-parsers: npm run build-parser-where && npm run build-parser-select && npm run build-parser-order-by && npm run build-parser-group-by && npm run build-parser-aliases && npm run build-parser-refine
scripts.build-parser-where: peggy --dts --format es --output api/src/api-compat/ods/where.peg.js api/src/api-compat/ods/where.pegjs api/src/api-compat/ods/lexic.pegjs && sed -i '1i // @ts-nocheck' api/src/api-compat/ods/where.peg.js
scripts.build-parser-select: peggy --dts --format es --output api/src/api-compat/ods/select.peg.js api/src/api-compat/ods/select.pegjs api/src/api-compat/ods/lexic.pegjs && sed -i '1i // @ts-nocheck' api/src/api-compat/ods/select.peg.js
scripts.build-parser-order-by: peggy --dts --format es --output api/src/api-compat/ods/order-by.peg.js api/src/api-compat/ods/order-by.pegjs api/src/api-compat/ods/lexic.pegjs && sed -i '1i // @ts-nocheck' api/src/api-compat/ods/order-by.peg.js
scripts.build-parser-group-by: peggy --dts --format es --output api/src/api-compat/ods/group-by.peg.js api/src/api-compat/ods/group-by.pegjs api/src/api-compat/ods/lexic.pegjs && sed -i '1i // @ts-nocheck' api/src/api-compat/ods/group-by.peg.js
scripts.build-parser-aliases: peggy --dts --format es --output api/src/api-compat/ods/aliases.peg.js api/src/api-compat/ods/aliases.pegjs api/src/api-compat/ods/lexic.pegjs && sed -i '1i // @ts-nocheck' api/src/api-compat/ods/aliases.peg.js
scripts.build-parser-refine: peggy --dts --format es --output api/src/api-compat/ods/refine.peg.js api/src/api-compat/ods/refine.pegjs api/src/api-compat/ods/lexic.pegjs && sed -i '1i // @ts-nocheck' api/src/api-compat/ods/refine.peg.js
scripts.check-types: tsc && tsc -p test-it/tsconfig.json && npm -w ui run check-types
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run build-types && npm -w ui run check-types && npm -w ui run build && npm -w parquet-writer run build && npm test && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=critical
